title: oh-my-mlip models.json
description: JSON Schema for models.json. Every model version must carry the four honesty fields: gated, weights, validation, and license_url. These guard against an 'all-validated' overclaim.

^_.description: _meta and any other underscore-prefixed keys are free-form.

^[A-Za-z].description: A framework entry (e.g. MACE, SevenNet, NequIP).

env.description: conda env name; unpack dir under ${OH_MY_MLIP_HOME}/envs/<env>

default_version.description: for a multi-version framework, the version key resolve() selects when version=None; must be one of this framework's 'versions' keys (cross-checked in tests/test_schemas.py + resolve())

env_run.description: key=value env-var prefix; parsed through parse_env_run allowlist — never raw shell

version_entry.description: Per-version data. The honesty fields (gated, weights, validation) plus the weights-provenance fields (weights_fetch, weights_source) are always required. At least one of 'inference' (plain) or both 'inference_sm86'+'inference_sm89' (arch-pinned) must be present.

oneOf.description: Non-arch-pinned version: plain inference array required.
Arch-pinned version: both inference_sm86 and inference_sm89 required.

allOf.description: gated-hf weights_source must be a Hugging Face repo id (owner/name).
url weights_source must be an http(s) URL or the placeholder 'TODO-owner-review' (allowed this increment).

gated.description: true -> weights require accepting an upstream license + HF_TOKEN; never redistributed here

license_url.description: URL of the upstream license page (required when gated=true; null when gated=false)

weights_fetch.description: mechanism by which weights are fetched: 'by-name' (resolved by model name/cache), 'url' (downloaded from an explicit URL), 'gated-hf' (gated Hugging Face repo requiring license acceptance + HF_TOKEN)

weights_source.description: the source value matching weights_fetch: an HF repo id (owner/name) for gated-hf, an http(s) URL (or the 'TODO-owner-review' placeholder this increment) for url, a resolver name/placeholder for by-name

validation.description: host-GPU validation state (guards against an 'all-validated' overclaim)
